_comment: vibe-wrap SessionEnd nudge — Antigravity/Gemini hook config. Merge this 'hooks' block into your workspace .gemini/settings.json (or user settings.json). On session close it runs session-end-nudge.py, which emits ONE line suggesting /vibe-wrap when the session left a trail (breadcrumbs, uncommitted files, or commits ahead of remote). Non-blocking; never invokes /vibe-wrap. The command path is relative to the workspace root where .agent/ was installed — adjust if your hooks run from a different cwd.

hooks.name: vibe-wrap-session-end-nudge
hooks.description: Emit a one-line /vibe-wrap nudge when the closing session left an uncommitted/unpushed trail.
